programme.title: Our Lives According to Buses - EP 4

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 39

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 40

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 135
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Tolong Naikin Gaji Asisten Pembantu Cintanya
programme.desc: It is told that Santi It wants to work anything, as long as it is halal, to be able to meet the needs of his family. Where initially Santi's life was ordinary, until one day suddenly Santi received services as a versatile person. Santi gets a job to help Raza (Fendy Chow) get back with his ex.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 589
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 83
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MENJARING CINTA DI TAMBAK NILA
programme.desc: Since becoming poor, Nila (Yuniza Icha) lives with her grandfather and manages his fish farm. Reza (Naufal Samudra), a regular customer at Nila’s fish pond, is upset because she no longer wants to sell him her fish. However, Reza keeps trying to persuade her since they both need the money.

programme.title: PLAYBOY OMDO, FINDING THE LOVE

programme.title: Mba Siomay Cantiknya Natural Tanpa Naturalisasi
programme.desc: Elisa Mayasari (Ersya Aurelia) was fired from her job because of pinjol, which continues to haunt her. Elisa's sister Oki borrows money from pinjol until Robin (Andrew Andika), a Dept Collector, is sent to Elisa's office to collect her brother's debt.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 589
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: ROMEO, JULIET & SI NENEK
programme.desc: Midun, who was in the midst of a passionate romance with Mira, was extremely annoyed with Mira's grandmother, who constantly criticized him, saying he was reckless, had no future, and was rude, to the point of interfering in his relationship with Mira.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 84
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MISS KUDA PEMACU CINTA
programme.desc: Asih always knew how to handle the horses at Burhan's ranch, Sandra's father. Bimo came to Burhan's ranch to undergo a series of tests, one of which was riding and caring for horses. As soon as he got on the horse, Bimo fell off. Fortunately, Asih was there to help. Asih was annoyed with Bimo because his car horn nearly caused one of the horses to become agitated. Since Burhan noticed that Bimo and Asih knew each other, he asked Asih to train Bimo in horseback riding.

programme.desc: Bara (Masaji Wijayanto) is a famous soccer player, he does not want to continue his grandmother's business of managing an inn. Yuna is a goat-herding village girl who is quick-tempered. When they meet because when Bara kicks the ball that causes Yuna's goats to run away.

programme.title: NUMPANG CURCOL JADI CINTA
programme.desc: Nanang met Dhea and they got into an argument. Nanang liked Dhea at first sight. But Ghea felt repulsed by him. Nanang was from Brebes and was naive and innocent, while Dhea was a trendy city girl. Ghea found a boarding house for Nanang, and they ended up living in the same neighborhood. As time goes on... Nanang always listens to Dhea's complaints about her life and her crush. Does Dhea realize that Nanang has feelings for her?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 137

programme.title: Miss Biduan I Love You Sekebon
programme.desc: Adrian (Elryan Carlen) is upset with Tifa (Ina Marika) for refusing to evict her house. Because of this, Tifa has to lose her job. Fortunately, Tifa meets a grandmother who offers her a job after helping her.

programme.title: Tikus dan Kucing - EP 7
programme.desc: Menceritakan kisah cinta Mitha dan Jaenal yang tidak mendapat restu ibu bapa masing-masing, kerana ibu bapa mereka sering bertengkar, dan saling membenci.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 19
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 7
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Kiah The Spy - EP 10
programme.desc: Kiah membina kumpulan baru untuk menguruskan perniagaan Ikan Pekasamnya,dia juga dilatih dan dilantik menjadi seorang ejen rahsia.

programme.title: NoYa - EP 6
programme.desc: Noya berhasrat untuk membawa semua kegilaan dan gelak ketawa yang telah diukir oleh Aya dan Noreen ke peringkat seterusnya.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 11
programme.desc: Bujang, 40 tahun, sepanjang hidupnya sudah beberapa kali dia gagal bercinta. Kegagalan ini antara lain disebabkan sikap ibunya yang terlalu mengongkong hidupnya. Ini membuatkan Bujang mengambil keputusan untuk terus membujang.

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau - EP 12
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan temubual bicara bersama pelawak yang di pentas kan di atas trak di kawasan luar bandar

programme.desc: Program menarik bersama Sepahtu untuk tontonan semua.

programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Jep & Judin - EP 2
programme.desc: Jep dan Judin adik-beradik tiri yang lurus bendul meminati sukan bermotor. Jep mahu jadi Johan Rempit dan Judin mahu menolongnya mencapai mimpi itu.

programme.title: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza - EP 1
programme.desc: Rancangan berbentuk permainan dan jelajah meredah kampung-kampung bersama selebriti-selebriti sambil melakukan pelbagai aktiviti bersama.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 12
programme.desc: Bujang, 40 tahun, sepanjang hidupnya sudah beberapa kali dia gagal bercinta. Kegagalan ini antara lain disebabkan sikap ibunya yang terlalu mengongkong hidupnya. Ini membuatkan Bujang mengambil keputusan untuk terus membujang.

programme.title: Dendam 5 Beradik - EP 4
programme.desc: Pakatan 5 beradik berjaya memberkas Jimmy dan pengikutnya. Jimmy dijatuhkan hukuman mati mandatori atas perlakuan jenayahnya.

programme.title: Perempuan Paling Bahagia - EP 26
programme.desc: Rafa tidak dibenarkan berkahwin dan hanya perlu fokus pada kerja. Arissa telah meminta izin untuk menumpang bermalam di masjid.

programme.title: Sorok - Sorok - EP 2
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk semua.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 11
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Sketso S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Konnichiwa Superlawak - EP 3
programme.desc: Saksikan Jep, Rahim, Pak Ya, Tomok, dan rakan-rakan bola sepak Superlawak FC menjelajah ke Jepun demi menyahut cabaran perlawanan persahabatan menentang pasukan tempatan di bumi Jepun!

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2019 - EP 7
programme.desc: Maharaja Lawak Mega kembali dengan penyertaan para pelawak terbaik di rantau ini merangkumi tiga negara Malaysia, Singapura dan Indonesia.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 4
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: You Know Nothing About Sports - EP 9
programme.desc: Kali ini dalam siri You Know Nothing, Sherry teringin untuk belajar sukan pula. Sherry akan berpasangan dengan seorang selebriti popular untuk mempelajari sukan baru yang akan di ajar oleh atlet terkenal.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X S3 - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan & sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia.

programme.title: Sorry, Sengaja! - EP 12
programme.desc: Rancangan "prank" yang berlaku di pejabat Astro, melibatkan pekerja-pekerja yang selalunya tidak menjangka akan sesuatu berlaku. Rancangan ini dikepalai oleh beberapa "prankster" dari Thinker Studios.

programme.title: Travel Lawak - EP 12
programme.desc: Sebuah program travelog yang menampilkan tiga pelawak popular iaitu Syuk, Sharif Zero dan Mamak Puteh di mana mereka akan mengembara ke luar negara dan meneroka sendiri budaya dan tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Stand Up Comedy Otai - EP 8
programme.desc: Masihkah anda ingat akan Pi Mai Pi Mai Tang Tu, Senario, Salih Yaacob, dan ramai lagi lagenda komedi tanah air? Kini mereka kembali di atas satu pentas bagi mengubat kerinduan terhadap mereka.

programme.title: Bocey & Friends - EP 8
programme.desc: Bocey & Friends, rancangan sitcom yang di bintangi oleh Achey, Fad, Abam, Zulin dan artis jemputan.

programme.title: MLM Terbaik 2016 - EP 1
programme.desc: Kompilasi MLM terbaik 2016 untuk anda semua.

programme.title: Punitha
programme.desc: Maragatham holds her step-daughter Punitha dear, to the point of being overbearing. However, their bond turns twisted & burdened when Punitha finds her soulmate, Kabilan. Amidst family betrayals, can Punitha show her mother the true meaning of love?

programme.title: Manamagale Vaa

programme.title: Lakshmi

programme.title: Iru Malargal
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: Aadukalam
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.desc: Abandoned by her father and coping with an alcoholic brother, Kayal works as a nurse to be her family's sole provider. She finds happiness in her sacrifice to meet the needs of her brother and sisters. Watch Kayal stand tall in her selfless journey.

programme.title: Marumagal

programme.title: The Great Indian Kitchen - EP 1

programme.title: Officer On Duty - EP 1

programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The lives of four individuals are turned upside down after they witness the murder of their friend. They band together to put the alleged killer behind bars, but years later, the imprisoned man seeks revenge, unraveling dark secrets that test their loyalty and survival.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 23
programme.desc: The Camille Claudel Museum includes works by artists from Nogent. Notebooks, coloured pencils and an overflowing imagination - that's the recipe of illustrator Pierre-Emmanuel Lyet. The models in the Kidsuper catwalk show live in a limitless imaginary world. Laetitia Baque and Victor Molinie are redrawing the contours of contemporary embroidery.

programme.title: Marianne - EP 5
programme.desc: The remains of a train driver have been found on a railway line. All the clues point to him having been knocked unconscious then placed on the rails whilst waiting for a train to pass. Investigating the case, Marianne finds each new detail more disturbing than the last.

programme.title: Marianne - EP 6
programme.desc: The wreck of a trawler lost nine years earlier has been found. Amongst the bones brought to the surface is a much fresher body, that of Vincent, the captain everyone thought had gone down with the ship. Marianne asks Aurore, Vincent's daughter, for help infiltrating the world of deep-sea fishing.

programme.title: Carbone - EP 9
programme.desc: We are all worried about the climate, but we're still not doing enough to solve the problem. Is our psychology acting as a brake on climate action?

Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine - EP 60
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Escapades En Suisse Italienne - EP 6
programme.desc: Adventure to the Devil's Bridge, which with its legends, takes us into the heart of the Gotthard, where a mysterious and splendid fortress has remained secret for decades.

programme.title: Bestioles & Cie - EP 26
programme.desc: Whether it's a lake, tree or field, there are always a host of mini-creatures. Often feared, because unknown, we discover just how fascinating they are as we take an immersive visit into their world. Often, and wrongly, underestimated, they play an essential role in the natural cycle of life.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 37
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Le Petit Geek - EP 24
programme.desc: What exactly does an influencer do? How do you create a video game? Why are screens dangerous, and what about digital identities? In each episode children shed light on today's virtual world.

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 15
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 3
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 4
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Enquetes De Region - EP 20
programme.desc: Today, for every three farmers who leave, one young person sets up. With their utopias and methods, more radical activists, these newcomers are shaking up a sector already in full reflection. The rural coordination is now an essential interlocutor in Normandy.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Banel Et Adama
programme.desc: In a remote village in northern Senegal. Banel and Adama love each other deeply, passionately, carried by their dreams. But can the absolute love that binds them truly withstand the weight of traditions? A bold and poetic contemporary tragedy.

programme.title: Nous Les Griots
programme.desc: Malik, Daouda's eldest son, wants to marry Mariama. But when a meeting between the two families, both originally from Senegal, is organised over a meal, Daouda discovers that they are from two very different social classes. His family is ''griot''; Mariama's is noble.

programme.title: Mboa, Matanda, Le Tournoi Des Rois
programme.desc: Within the city of Mboa Matanda, the Crab and Cayman districts have been doing battle for centuries. Tasked with restoring peace, General Dibombe organises a wrestling tournament between the champions of the different districts. But then he finds himself facing General Essoka, the man who had murdered his family.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 1
programme.desc: Marianne, Leon's mother has died. Now he has to move to Montreal to live with Francis, his biological father. Fortunately his grandfather Bernard will be at his side during this painful ordeal.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 2
programme.desc: Leon visits his new secondary school to finalise his admission with the headmaster. Meanwhile Francis realises that he'll have to make some changes in the house to make life easier for Leon.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 3
programme.desc: It's Leon's first day at school! His French teacher is convinced he'll be an asset for the class. Leon meets Florence, a pupil suffering from cystic fibrosis.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 4
programme.desc: Ricardo has to choose a member of his family who inspires him for a French project, which leads him to question his mother about his biological father. Leon learns a little more about the relationship between his parents.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express - EP 20
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 1890. Near Fontainebleau. Olivia starts her new school year at a wealthy girls' boarding school run by two teachers, Miss Cara and Miss Julie, who are much admired by the pupils. The ingenue Olivia soon falls under the spell of the erudite and charismatic Julie. An all-female film, elegant and sultry.

programme.title: Lola Sang Contact
programme.desc: While women live under the absolute authority of their husbands, Lola and her friends have obtained permission to spend an evening in a restaurant. During this interlude, they talk about their nightmarish daily lives.

programme.title: Qu'importe La Distance
programme.desc: At five in the morning, Yalla walks out on her job as a care assistant without telling her boss. Exhausted, she boards a bus. And so begins a long journey by public transport towards someone who is waiting for her.

programme.desc: Idriss's secret is out in the open and everyone in the law firm knows that he only has a few months left to live. Assisted by Claire, Nadia defends a man accused of having killed his wife, suffering from Alzheimer's disease. An act of love or premeditated femicide?

programme.title: Le Code - EP 2
programme.desc: Idriss defends Duval, accused of killing a man trying to steal from him. Legitimate defence? It seems obvious but the facts and the judge's investigations challenge his client's version. Nadia comes to the assistance of her partner Alice, a teacher accused of having hit a pupil in her class.

programme.title: Carbone - EP 9
programme.desc: We are all worried about the climate, but we're still not doing enough to solve the problem. Is our psychology acting as a brake on climate action?

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 1890. Near Fontainebleau. Olivia starts her new school year at a wealthy girls' boarding school run by two teachers, Miss Cara and Miss Julie, who are much admired by the pupils. The ingenue Olivia soon falls under the spell of the erudite and charismatic Julie. An all-female film, elegant and sultry.

programme.desc: After the fall of the Berlin Wall in 1989, Germany faced a historic question: Where should its capital be located? Should it remain in Bonn, the quiet postwar seat of government, or return to Berlin, a city that had experienced empires, dictatorships, and division? programme.title: Movie - Kadhal Sugamanathu
programme.desc: A woman loves a man but does not have the courage to confess her feelings. Instead, she asks her younger sister to approach her love interest. However her sister betrays her by proposing to him herself.

programme.title: Movie - Sakthi Vel
programme.desc: Sakthivel, an honest police officer, beats up the son of a politician. Following this, he is promoted and transferred to a village, but his promotion only lands him in trouble.

programme.title: Movie - Sathyam Sivam Sundaram
programme.desc: Sathyam Sivam Sundaram is a Tamil feature film starring Baby Shamili, Nizhalgal Ravi and Radha.

programme.title: Movie - Chinna Chinna Aasaigal
programme.desc: Vasu is tired of following his strict father's rules and dreams of being as carefree as his friends. When his father leaves on a business trip, he finally has the chance to be independent.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Thadam
programme.desc: During the investigation of a man's murder, the police find their prime suspect. However, the case gets complicated when the police also learn that their suspect has a lookalike.

programme.title: Movie - Naai Sekar
programme.desc: Sekar's scientist neighbour is hell-bent on proving that it is possible to alter the DNA of animals and humans. When Sekar is bitten by a dog being experimented on, their traits get swapped.

programme.title: Movie - Kidari
programme.desc: Kombaiah Pandiayan, a big shot in his village, is stabbed by one of his enemies. Following this, his loyal servant Kidaari sets out to find the culprit.

programme.title: Movie - Manam Kothi Paravaigal
programme.desc: The son of a construction business owner falls in love with his neighbour's daughter. His life lands in danger when he learns that her father is a criminal.

programme.title: Movie - Unakkum Enakkum
programme.desc: A young man leaves his luxurious life to prove to his lover's brother that he is not a spoilt rich brat. He works hard and lives like a farmer till the next harvest, and wins everyone's heart.

programme.title: Movie - Charlie Chaplin
programme.desc: When Ramakrishnan is caught with a prostitute, he introduces her to his wife as Thiru's girlfriend. Thiru, feeling helpless, goes along with the plan at the cost of upsetting his own girlfriend, Susi.

programme.title: Movie - Neethikku Thandanai
programme.desc: Supporters of the village's panchayat president beat up a few men who stand against their leader. A doctor gets into trouble after he treats the victims' wounds.

programme.title: Movie - En Purushan Ethir Veetu Ponnu
programme.desc: Pandi is happily married to his uncle's daughter. But misunderstandings creep into their relationship when his wife suspects him of having an affair.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Chinna Mappillai
programme.desc: Thangadurai, who works as a coolie, lies to Janaki that he is rich and marries her. When Janaki's mother learns about this, she plots to destroy their marriage, but succumbs to their love.

programme.title: Movie - Mandira Punnagai
programme.desc: Manthira Punnagai is a 1986 Indian Tamil-language film directed by V. Thamizhazhagan in his debut, and produced by G. Thyagarajan.

programme.title: Movie - Isai Paadum Thendral
programme.desc: Mohan's father wants him to marry Menaka, but Mohan likes Kalyani. His father gives in to his demands, but Menaka has other plans.

programme.title: Movie - Azhahi
programme.desc: A veterinarian recalls his childhood days when he fell in love with a girl who studied with him at school.

programme.title: Movie - Kaakki Sattai
programme.desc: Mathimaran, a police officer, learns about an organ donation racket from his lady-love, Divya. During the course of his investigation, he uncovers shocking secrets and faces unexpected obstacles.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2010/2011 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is 'Head of Football Operations'. He opens up about the challenges and rewards of his new role, while reflecting on a remarkable career in the Premier League that took him to West Ham United, Newcastle United and Chelsea. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 16
programme.desc: An evergreen strand that relives classic matches, seasons and moments in the company of those who starred in them.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 2
programme.desc: Expect high-level insight and revealing anecdotes as some of the finest players in PL history explain the techniques and temperaments that took them to the top.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 31
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 41
programme.desc: We shine a spotlight on Unai Emery, tracing the journey of one of Europe's most meticulous and innovative coaches from his roots in Spain to the pinnacle of the Premier League. Through exclusive interviews with his brother and the coaches who guided him in his early years, we uncover the dedication, detail and relentless drive that shaped his rise in the game.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 31
programme.desc: This week, The Big Interview sits down with Newcastle United's Malick Thiaw to discuss his journey to the Premier League. Growing up in Dusseldorf within a multicultural family, the German International reflects on his early life and the role models that shaped him. Rising through the academy systems of various Bundesliga clubs, Thiaw made his mark at Schalke 04 before donning the famous Rossoneri shirt of AC Milan where he won the Supercoppa Italiana in 2025.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 30
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: EXTRA TIME - MON 16 MAR
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is 'Head of Football Operations'. He opens up about the challenges and rewards of his new role, while reflecting on a remarkable career in the Premier League that took him to West Ham United, Newcastle United and Chelsea. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 16
programme.desc: An evergreen strand that relives classic matches, seasons and moments in the company of those who starred in them.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 17 MAR

programme.title: FS MMA Nick Thompson vs. Davion Peterson
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! BodogFight former welterweight champion Nick Thompson looks to send Davion Peterson into submission in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Edwin Rodriguez vs. Jason Escalera
programme.desc: This episode features a USBA super middleweight title bout that sees Edwin Rodriguez defend against the undefeated Jason Escalera.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Lamont Peterson vs. Amir Khan
programme.desc: Lamont Peterson takes on Amir Khan in a bout with a controversial ending, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Marcos Maidana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Amir Khan defending the WBA light welterweight title against Marcos Maidana in a bout that earned 2010 Fight of the Year honors from the Boxing Writers Association of America. Also on the card, a young Adrien Broner showcases his skills.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Okinoumi, Kotoyuki, Kotoshogiku and Endo from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the first ever Judo Grand Prix from Cancun, stop to get to know number 2 ranked fighter in the world Tal Flicker, and show a demonstration on how to execute one of Flicker's favorite submissions.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features a look at rising star Ryan "Darth" Bader. We go over BMX bike jumps with heavyweight Roy "Big Country" Nelson. And MMA:30 takes you inside the training camp of stud wrestler Phil Davis and we take a look at Bellator's duel promotional event Dynamite.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Joe Calzaghe vs Roy Jones Jr.
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a light heavyweight championship match between Joe Calzaghe (45-0, 32 KOs) and Roy Jones Jr. (52-4, 38 KOs) from Madison Square Garden in New York City, New York, USA, on November 8, 2008.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds conclude at the Port of Los Angeles in San Pedro, Cal., before the historic battleship USS Iowa, where a very special all active duty and retired military members tackle such obstacles as the Log Runner and I Beam Cross.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Travis Walker vs. Chris Arreola
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle among heavyweights as Travis Walker faces the then-undefeated Chris Arreola, who was ranked in the top 10 by four of the boxing organizations. While the fight seems to go to one side after the opening bell, the momentum quickly shifts.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.desc: Episode 7: Mexico City, Mexico - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Boxing and the Martial Art of Hands with Masters Igancio Nacho" Beristain and Tiburcio Garcia."

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams I
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features middleweights Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (44-1, 24 KOs) vs. Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (37-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on December 5, 2009. The result was a controversial majority decision, and the two would eventually square off in a rematch about a year later.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Michael Katsidis
programme.desc: This episode features lightweight champion Juan Manuel Marquez defending against Michael Katsidis, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Hohhot Grand Prix, and stop to get to know the world's #1 ranked fighter Aleksandar Kukolj. We then head to Russia to witness the effect that Judo has on the Russian people.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs Orlando Lora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman facing off with Orlando Lora. A left hook and right uppercut combination ends this fight. Also on the card, action from former heavyweight champion James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Mitakeumi, Goeido, Okinoumi and Takakeisho from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Weapons as well as Girl's Forms and Team Demo highlights.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 63
programme.desc: Tinky Winky and Laa-Laa are in Home Dome when the Tubby Phone rings. It's Dipsy and Po calling from the Tubby Mobile to say 'Hello'.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S2) - EP 17
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'goat' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! Dee meets lots of different goats - a white goat, a brown goat, a bearded goat and a baby goat!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 13
programme.desc: After accidentally causing a mini avalanche, Messy must help Lofty dig out the entrance to his cave.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 7
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 51
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch has travelled to Ilulissat in Greenland to show his teddy, Cuddles, the sights. But Cuddles ends up getting stuck in the snow!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 19
programme.desc: When Bluey and Bingo are unable to grab a prize on a Magic Claw machine, Mum and Dad create their own version at home. But Dad isn't about to make winning easy.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 22
programme.desc: During a game of bus, passenger Mum is too shy to tell bus driver Dad that she secretly loves him, until she gets some help from the Grannies.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 33
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 34
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: In South America, Andy spots flamingos in a mountain lake and sets about painting them.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 35
programme.desc: The Squirrels are having fun playing a song they made, but they wish that they could see themselves perform. Duggee has a great suggestion, and they learn how to be creative.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 34
programme.desc: Duggee has lost the list he made for the Squirrel's activities for the day at Squirrel Club. After a quick lesson on what a list is, they are happy to help Duggee recreate his.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 33
programme.desc: Whilst helping Duggee clean up, the Squirrels come across an old lamp. Duggee explains that many years ago, when rubbed, it could grant three magical wishes.

programme.desc: Xuli finds a shipwreck on a coral reef and learns some glitches don't need to be fixed.

programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters save the world's stinkiest plant from becoming Glitch's latest perfume?

With Boss Baby’s cover at stake, it’s up to the Templeton Family to get Benji out of their hair as he sniffs around for a case that could garner the attention from federal law enforcement.

And it gets worse when Crispin Biscuits switches electronic ID tags with her, causing everyone to assume Tina actually is Crispin Biscuits. With Crispin having booked her for a seemingly endless stay, Tina is trapped in a paradise nightmare, and in a tunnel of madness starts to think that she may even be Crispin.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 34

She can jump really high! Then Flea can jump everywhere and see everything.! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 64

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: The Dragon Riders discover a lush island that turns out to be the home of the Deathsong, a massive dragon that threatens to trap them forever.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: On an island that will make the perfect outpost, the Dragon Riders discover its indigenous residents are a mysterious new breed of dragon.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 3

programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold’s latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 18

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 65

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 66

With both companies pouring their resources into a simulated space take off, tempers and sabotage are running hot, and the scrappy little startup is in danger of getting crushed by their big business competitor.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 67

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24) - EP 600
programme.desc: Rick races to nab a 1959 go-kart. Can he pave his way to a deal? A collection of toys from "Jurassic Park" comes roaring into the shop. But are these toys as dino-mite as Chum hopes?

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4) - EP 11
programme.desc: When the team performs a hi-tech experiment at the Triangle, it leads to a stunning revelation that may explain the strange phenomena on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4) - EP 25
programme.desc: Thieves steal half a billion dollars in masterpieces from the Gardner Museum. An exhaustive search has failed to recover the stolen goods. Who orchestrated the biggest art heist in history and why?

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S3) - EP 3
programme.desc: Mother Nature may be breathtaking-but she doesn't always play nice. Whether it's a mile-long sinkhole that swallows everything in its path or a biblical swarm of crop-killing grasshoppers.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5) - EP 7
programme.desc: A perfectly masterminded plot leads to the most brazen prison break in American history. With only a handful of clues left behind, the search for the infamous Alcatraz escapees continues to this day.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII - EP 6
programme.desc: Racing an incoming hurricane, Darrell Miklos and his team are forced to make tough choices. But after a season-long search, they locate the source of the massive magnetometer hit recorded at Target 4.

programme.title: Alone (S11) - EP 12
programme.desc: As the temperature dips well below freezing, the river stops paying dividends. The three participants are forced to weigh tapping out versus a lifetime of regret.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6) - EP 3
programme.desc: A violent assault ends in a fatal stabbing when a young mother kills her boyfriend to defend her child. Considered innocent by police for four years, she was re-arrested and faces up to 41 years in prison.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 528
programme.desc: A young man who came to the U.S. to fulfil his dreams is killed at a birthday party, and Tulsa police must cut through a web of lies to find the culprit.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 527
programme.desc: After an argument in his home, a man answers a knock at his front door and is suddenly shot and killed.

programme.desc: Siba and Paul send the Bakers back in time for retro week, recalling classics like Choux Pastry Swans, steamed puddings and layered terrines. It's another challenging week for the bakers, who are all out to claim the title of Star Baker and avoid being sent home.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show (S33) - EP 1
programme.desc: Graham Norton presents a lively chat show featuring Dwayne Johnson, Emily Blunt, Matthew McConaughey, James Norton and RAYE.

programme.title: The World's Most Secret Hotels (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: In Jordan we find out what it's like to stay deep in the desert sleeping underneath the stars at the Bubble Luxotel Wadi Rum resort - a remote and unusual series of transparent "bubble" tents which look more like a cluster of space craft on Mars. In Norfolk, England, we visit an unusual two hundred year old building, known as Cley Windmill.

programme.title: Nisha Katona's Home Kitchen (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Nisha is making a meatball curry, an Indian chai tea and a Mayan chilli hot chocolate and tandoori chops with turmeric chips, as well as a great veggie kebab option too.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6 - EP 1

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6 - EP 2

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 43
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Liquid Death was founded on the idea of breaking the norms of traditional marketing. We speak to CMO Dan Murphy about the water company's origin as a "sheep in wolf's clothing."

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We speak with Pranav Yadav, CEO of Neuro-Insight, about the marketing intelligence his company is gleaning from neuroscience.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Lisa McKnight, Mattel's chief brand officer, has been at the forefront of reviving the iconic Barbie. Now the famous toy brand has launched itself beyond store shelves and onto the silver screen.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: McLaren Racing CEO Zak Brown discusses the technology, data and effort required to propel the McLaren brand onto the modern F1 stage and into living rooms around the globe.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Stephan Pretorious, chief technology officer of WPP, unpacks the world of generative artificial intelligence and its potential impact, both positive and negative, on marketing.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: From immersive experiences to live streaming, National Women's Soccer League Chief Marketing and Commercial Officer Julie Haddon discusses the opportunities for growing women's professional sports.

programme.title: The Growing Toll of America's Booming Kratom Industry
programme.desc: In this Bloomberg Originals documentary, we reveal how the unregulated substance is being promoted and even made more potent, and how some users are ending up dead.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S5 - EP 5
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. programme.title: Special Drama "A Novelist's Diary"
programme.desc: The bestselling mystery novelist Serizawa Kan (Itao Itsuji) has died. Eto Megumi (Kaho), who had long hoped to become his editor, learns from his wife, Serizawa Mariko (Sylvia Grab), that he left behind a diary. To her surprise, it contains warm, intimate entries unlike anything in his writing - passages secretly added by Mariko, revealing her hidden feelings for her late husband. Desperate in her faltering career, Megumi makes Mariko a proposal that crosses the line of editorial ethics.

Be thoroughly entertained by the sharp and witty Meng Fei, one of the top hosts for shows of this genre, as he presents a unique and humorous approach to interactions between all the participants.

programme.title: Genius Go Go Go - EP 209
programme.desc: This large-scale variety show gathers showbiz entertainers to challenge each other in various hilarious educational games. Viewers at home are also encouraged to get in on the fun and try out the games with friends in real life!

programme.title: AI Romantic - EP 26
programme.desc: Ah Bao (Ali Lee), a high-end AI, accidentally got lost when leaving the factory and happened to land into Gu family. Ah Bao assisted Gu family with various strange tasks. At the same time, she detects a computer virus that may terminate her life.

programme.title: Billionaire Story - EP 410
programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: Destined - EP 15
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.title: Mr Player - EP 85
programme.desc: Get ready for some serious fun with one of Taiwan's most popular outdoor variety shows! Golden Bell Award-winning hosts Jacky Wu and KID travel all over Taiwan and other parts of the world alongside celebrity guests to compete in races and complete missions.

programme.title: Best Choice Ever - EP 24
programme.desc: Mai Cheng Huan, a post-95 girl from an ordinary Shanghainese family proposes to her boyfriend, Xin Jia Liang, due to her mother's urging. The well-to-do Xin family topples the balance of this relationship. Watch how Cheng Huan embarks on her own growth path.

programme.title: Destined - EP 15
programme.desc: Lin Yu Ru, the daughter of a cloth merchant who's suffered childhood hardships and she is married to Gu Jiu Si who is the notorious son of Yangzhou's wealthiest family, infamous for his indolent ways. They grow closer despite their differences.

programme.title: South Wind Knows - EP 24
programme.desc: Adapted from a novel, the story tells the story of how Yun Shen (Cheng Yi), a researcher at a pharmaceutical company and Zhu Jiu (Zhang Yu Xi), a surgeon embarking on a humanitarian medical rescue, got off the wrong foot, but eventually found love.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. Expecting the viewing of the movie for nearly an hour is a rhythm and fresh, like a cloud and flowing water, which makes the viewers moved and harvests a rich intellectual journey.

programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. The discussions ranging from controvercial topics to gossip and current events. Moreover, surprises from the guests of the show often go beyond all your expectation that you don't want to miss out!

programme.title: Super Followers
programme.desc: Join Jacky Wu and Sandy Wu as they bridge generation gaps and co-host this programme that integrates intellectual interviews to present a unique and high-quality variety talk show!

programme.title: Hit the Headlines
programme.desc: Headline Talk Show is a political show co-hosted by anchor Zhou Yuqin and director of the political center Lin Jiayuan. Today's major current events can be seen in "Headline Talk Show"! Taiwan shouldn't just have only one voice, nor should Taiwan have only one color. "Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: Pretty Dangerous & What's On Today - EP 18
programme.desc: Undercover cop Pan Yifeng leads three elite female agents - the Sherlock-like Shen Jiaqi, martial artist Jiang Miaozhi, and data whiz Tong Xiaoru - to bust a "Fairy Dust" drug ring near tycoon Liu Biao's circle.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2766
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: If You Wish Upon Me - EP 16
programme.desc: Yoon Gyeo Rye lived at an orphanage, spent time in prison, and now struggles to lead a normal life. He volunteers at a hospice, where he works alongside volunteer team leader Kang Tae Sik and nurse Seo Yeon Joo. Despite his dark past and aggressive attitude, he unknowingly seeks comfort.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 14
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2170
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Homeland Guardian - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. Joining the Special Duties Unit, he and his team, fight to uncover and thwart a plot against Hong Kong’s financial system.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 30
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2170
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Hilarious Family - EP 7
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: No Return - EP 1
programme.desc: Rewind to the 1920s in Shanghai, and Chai Shap-chat has borrowed money from Wing Yip Bank. Wing Yip Bank principal Tang Kwai-sim, aka Master, admires Shap-chat’s eloquence, so she asks him to go with her to Hangzhou to discuss business matters. On the way, Shap-chat clinches some business deal with his sweet talk. He also wins tycoon Master Three over.

programme.title: No Return - EP 2
programme.desc: Mau-choi and Wai Ho meet Commander Tong’s minions at Kwai Heung Lau. They seemingly banter. Danger is everywhere as they actually probe each other. From some picture album, Fa-heung recognizes Wai Ho was her schoolmate who once saved her life. Kwai-sim’s older brother Tang Kwai-sun, aka Master Sun, and other bosses ask Kwai-sim to settle her debts, causing a bank run crisis.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 844
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 8
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Brick Slaves - EP 18
programme.desc: LAU YIU-MING (Vincent Wong) exhausts the money that he and his girlfriend have saved for many years to buy a property and is about to get married. Out of the blue, his girlfriend not only wants to break up with him, but also secretly leases the premises out to a piano teacher, CHOI KIN-CHING (Selena Li). Unfortunately, YIU-MING's bad day gets even worse as he is soon laid off from work.

programme.title: Unchained Medley - EP 3
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 14
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 18
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. Its owner POON WING-NIN (Yueh Hua), because of his advanced age, has handed over the charge to his elder son POON KA-HIN (Evergreen Mak) and daughter POON HAU-YEE (Hong Wah). Out of the blue, HAU-YEE commits suicide, so his second son POON KA-YEUNG (Steven Ma), who was serving as a combat medic, returns to his hometown, taking over the reins.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 19
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 14
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 18
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. Its owner POON WING-NIN (Yueh Hua), because of his advanced age, has handed over the charge to his elder son POON KA-HIN (Evergreen Mak) and daughter POON HAU-YEE (Hong Wah). Out of the blue, HAU-YEE commits suicide, so his second son POON KA-YEUNG (Steven Ma), who was serving as a combat medic, returns to his hometown, taking over the reins.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 19

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 8

This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Brick Slaves - EP 18
programme.desc: LAU YIU-MING (Vincent Wong) exhausts the money that he and his girlfriend have saved for many years to buy a property and is about to get married. Out of the blue, his girlfriend not only wants to break up with him, but also secretly leases the premises out to a piano teacher, CHOI KIN-CHING (Selena Li). Unfortunately, YIU-MING's bad day gets even worse as he is soon laid off from work.
